delivered_state.ci_lint_recovery: Prepared in PR #90. Seven explicit-any errors were replaced with unknown-based handling, two Fast Refresh warnings were explicitly allowlisted, a shared getErrorMessage utility was added, and the normal CI completed typecheck, lint, tests and build successfully.
delivered_state.frente_fiscal_v1_acquisition: delivered in commit 02e198b; Frente Fiscal split-screen panel added under /fiscal with client-side XML DOMParser (NF-e/NFS-e), 44-digit key checksum validator, automatic CNPJ extraction, OCR sandbox simulator and transactional public.homologar_despesa_fiscal RPC with sandbox localStorage fallback.
delivered_state.relacao_bens_anexo_ii: delivered in commit e9fc22b; library generateRelacaoBens.ts added using ExcelJS to compile the Relação de Bens Adquiridos from capital despesas.
delivered_state.portal_diretor_real_time_despesas: delivered in commit e9fc22b; Portal do Diretor lists audited invoices and provides the Anexo II download.
delivered_state.gad_auditoria_estorno: delivered in commit 4345c37; Despesas card added to /escolas/:id with estornar_despesa_fiscal RPC integration.
delivered_state.security_center_panel: delivered in commit 87263bd; component contains simulated security states and still requires a separate institutional truthfulness correction.
delivered_state.responsividade_mobile_refinement: delivered in commit 24d775f; responsive table columns and stackable document panels.
delivered_state.painel_visual_polish: delivered in PR #79; visual refinements across the executive panel.
delivered_state.admin_roles_ui: delivered in PR #75 (Marco 6B v0); /configuracoes user list and role management.
delivered_state.geracao_em_lote_163_demonstrativos: delivered in PR #73; generateDemonstrativosLote and batch processing control.
